identity.name: Winsome
identity.story: Fishes the wishes out weekly and files them by sincerity. Returns the coins of the insincere.

relationships.kind: files the gold-egg wishes under insincere, as requested

child.label: opening a well that's finally hers to open

children.label: walking down to the wellhead she raised herself
drawing up the day's first wish, sincere or not

child.label: filing wishes the way she always meant to

children.label: crossing back to the finished stone
filing sincere wishes on the left, insincere on the right

child.label: closing the millstream bridge's last course

children.label: walking down to the span that only needs one more course
setting the last stones and stepping back to look at a bridge, not a plan

child.label: standing on the far bank for the first time

children.label: walking all the way across her own bridge
wishing on her own coin, at last, from the other side
